precondition: panel has been hard power-cycled or otherwise recovered from the current connect/sendme silent state

recommended_order.label: Seed-side runtime limitation runner with D/?/A control chain
If the runner shows textselect+filestream positive but filebrowser negative, treat that as very strong evidence for A-type-specific multi-page runtime limitation
If the runner is blocked by transport or panel state, retry the official recovery lane

notes: The seed-side runner is now the highest-value next live discriminator because the compiled-data envelope for page1 file-browser has been largely exhausted offline.
The text-select control is the strongest seed-side control sample, file-stream is second, and file-browser is the target falsification sample.
